title: atragene alpina subsp. sibirica
intro: Atragene alpina subsp. sibirica, also known as the Siberian Alpine Poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family Papaveraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of alkaloids, which have anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Atragene alpina subsp. sibirica include its ability to relieve pain and reduce inflammation, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
